title: Inequality operator for virtual interface object throws error
body:
Comparison of virtual-interface handle like:
    if (vif != null) begin

throws error during CPP compile stage. 
```log
from Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real__ALL.cpp:3:
Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real___024unit__03a__03amy_c__Vclpkg__0.cpp: In constructor ‘Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real___024unit__03a__03amy_c::Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real___024unit__03a__03amy_c(Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real__Syms*)’:
Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real___024unit__03a__03amy_c__Vclpkg__0.cpp:11:32: error: no match for ‘operator!=’ (operand types are ‘VlNull’ and ‘Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real_my_if*’)
   11 |     if (VL_UNLIKELY(((VlNull{} != this->__PVT__vif)))) {
      |                       ~~~~~~~~ ^~ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      |                       |                 |
      |                       VlNull            Vaf_sv_vlt_rand_real_my_if*

```
 
> What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

verilator --binary af_sv_vlt_vif_7116.sv

> What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?  

Verilator 5.045 devel rev vUNKNOWN-built20260217-372921d
Yes

> Did you try it with other simulators?

Yes

> What OS and distribution are you using?

CentOS

> May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?

Yes please

Test:
```verilog
interface my_if;
endinterface : my_if

class my_c;
  virtual my_if vif;

  function new();
    if (vif != null) begin
      $info ("Non null VIF");
    end
  endfunction : new
endclass : my_c

module test;
  initial begin
    // Create an instance of the my_c class
    /* verilator lint_off IMPLICITSTATIC */
    my_c my_c_o = new();
    #10;
    $finish(2);

  end
endmodule


```
